title: Senior Software Engineer - Zomato - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Zomato - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Zomato in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!
